summary: Jeff github-repos/bun signal evaluated as no-action: Dicklesworthstone/bun is an unmodified fork of oven-sh/bun with compare status identical, ahead_by=0, behind_by=0, total_commits=0.
did: Verified repo metadata with gh repo view.
Verified compare oven-sh:main...Dicklesworthstone:main is identical with zero commits ahead or behind.
Recorded four-hypothesis triage and classifier-learning disposition.
Updated daily-jeff-ingest so unmodified GitHub forks are archived signals instead of actionable new-tool beads.
did_not: Did not clone or mirror the fork.
Did not install Bun or make it a Flywheel dependency.
Did not treat an unmodified fork as Jeffrey-authored substrate.
classifier_lesson: github-repos new-tool classifier should not file unmodified forks as new Jeffrey tools without a nonzero ahead_by or Jeffrey-authored delta.
